textByHash.8f530d9a9304352de3ccfb530fcd1e23708ebda7: Hey! This is the Queen's forest. You'll need her approval to make use of it.
textByHash.92518e68f3984d295c8a98142eefc6629abb88fd: The storerooms are full, your Highness. You should talk to Advisor Ghrim to collect what we've gathered for you.
textByHash.d863c4cea4a4407d1f89cadf8cf9aabee3b811b0: I'm cutting down mahogany and teak trees to make into furniture. It takes a while.
